note_text:
*Envive Care Conference Review - V 4.0
Wound Status: Arterial to Right lower extremity / Measures 2.9 cm x 1.3 cm / Stage: N/A
Drainage present - serosanguineous, moderate. No odor noted. Treatment: Foam dressing change daily.

Subjective: Patient reports pain at Right lower extremity wound site, rates 6/10.
Objective: Wound assessment performed. Arterial arterial Right lower extremity measures 2.9 cm x 1.3 cm x 0.3 cm.
  Wound bed: 42% slough, 58% granulation tissue. Periwound: macerated.
  Drainage: moderate. Odor: present, foul.
Assessment: Arterial arterial Right lower extremity — not improving.
Plan: Debridement consult ordered. Physician notified of wound progression.
